final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" holding a sign.

Style/medium: Douyin livestream interface screenshot, mobile UI mockup
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, livestream interface overlay with comments and reactions visible, subject centered holding sign
Subject: "神仙姐姐" holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: Douyin livestream room interface with typical UI elements (viewer count, comments, gift buttons, live indicator)
Lighting/mood: bright studio lighting typical of influencer livestreams
Color palette: Douyin brand colors (black, white, pink accents)
Materials/textures: digital screen interface, glossy sign surface
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must look like authentic Douyin livestream screenshot, 9:16 aspect ratio
Avoid: Western streaming platform UI (Twitch/YouTube), desktop interface elements
